spans.text: of a mind at ease , The sprightly joys that rural scenes can yield , When spring
while deep midnight hold her silent reign , And fancy bears the ravished thought along , Dark Melancholy spreads her airy train
her silent reign , And fancy bears the ravished thought along , Dark Melancholy spreads her airy train
the ravished thought along , Dark Melancholy spreads her airy train
I once was St. John ! from the bounds Of unknown realms beneath the dreary wave , Where ever-restless floods in nightly rounds , Roll their dark surges over my watery grave
John ! from the bounds Of unknown realms beneath the dreary wave , Where ever-restless floods in nightly rounds , Roll their dark surges over my watery grave
to climes beyond the distant wave , Even then unnoticed over my destined head Hung Death's dire form
to climes beyond the distant wave , Even then unnoticed over my destined head Hung Death's dire form
unnoticed over my destined head Hung Death's dire form
for many a joyous morn , To taste of raptures unallayed by woe
At once from life and every pleasure torn

the long , the unreversed decree : Nor earth must know the rest " — Where art thou now , In youthful joys my partner and my friend , Of those blessed hours thy fortune gave below , Of all our hopes is this the fatal end
the rest " — Where art thou now
the sun no more Wheel his long course
pitying heaven our purer spirits raise , Each crime atoned , each virtue well refined , To pass a blessed eternity of praise
